items.name_cn:
Small
👄Dior New Toujours Handbag, this Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the 2023 Spring/Summer show. Its casual and practical design is unique, crafted from imported calfskin and finished with oversized woven quilting. The spacious interior compartment with a small pocket allows for neat storage of daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D rotary clasp, adjustable sides to enhance style, and a leather handle with adjustable details for easy carrying. CD Lock and strap closure with Dior charm, detachable inner pocket, adjustable leather handle, includes dust bag! Model: M1188s, Size: 23x15x15cm.

items.name_cn:
Dior Groove🔆 25 Handbag 'Large Blue'
This Dior Groove 25 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from blue calfskin, it features a quilted oversized woven pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The zippered lock opens with the included key charm. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Zipper closure with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key charm embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, comes with a key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1365
Size: 25 x 19 x 16 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 small bag, 1 wallet, 1 phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses and lipstick

Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. Crafted from blue Oblique printed fabric, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern to elevate the look. The compartment is spacious enough for various daily essentials. With a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Zippered closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 16 x 11 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
♣️DiorTravel Backpack "Small Blue Cloth"
This DiorTravel backpack cleverly blends Dior's classic details with a fashionable and practical design. Crafted from blue jacquard technical fabric, it is fully adorned with Oblique print and features a prominent Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious main compartment has a zipper for easy access to various daily essentials. It comes with a handle and shoulder straps, allowing it to be worn on the shoulder or as a backpack.
Christian Dior Paris logo on the front
Adjustable straps
Front zip pocket
Model: 096
Dimensions: 23.5 x 32 x 11 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
(Small) DI0R Oblique Pink Elephant Backpack
A DI0R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's choice. Based on the embroidered elephant design, it also features a small metal logo, looking cute and soft. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, is light in weight, and is practical with a great look ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has blended into everyone's fashionable attitude~ Carrying a vintage item makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go. Recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Small: 23.5×11×32CM
Large: 29×14×36CM
#1523#510

items.name_cn:
9319# White Calfskin Medium, Actual Product!!️
Latest Bobby series, named in tribute to DI0R's pet dog, symbolizing loyalty and success, so this is a bag that can accompany you forever😘. Combining classic and fashion, the retro shape interprets the freedom, confidence, and elegance of an independent woman💃🏻. Love it to no end❤️
size: 22*17*6cm
